title: [LTL] Add Boolean Constant Op, use in Implication Canonicalizer

features.name: concurrent assertion with disable iff and constant-true property
features.description: Code should include a concurrent assertion using disable iff with a constant 1-bit true literal (1'h1) as the property body, representing a trivially true assertion

features.name: SVA implication with constant-false antecedent
features.description: Code should include an SVA property implication where the antecedent is a constant-false literal (1'h0), which should canonicalize to a trivially true property

features.name: SVA implication with constant-true consequent
features.description: Code should include an SVA property implication where the consequent is a constant-true literal (1'h1), which should canonicalize to a trivially true property
